name: multi-select
description: Multi-selection dropdown block with search and chip display.

props.name: options
props.description: All available options to display. Each option has a label (display text) and value (unique identifier).

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected option values.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the updated selection array whenever an option is toggled.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the option chips.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the options; also activates the error colour on the label.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the options when there is no error.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all option chips, preventing selection changes.

props.name: maxSelect
props.description: Maximum number of options that can be selected simultaneously. Unlimited when omitted.

props.name: renderItem
props.type: (option: MultiSelectOption, selected: boolean, disabled: boolean) => ReactNode
props.description: Custom renderer for each option chip. Replaces the default chip UI when provided.
